title: index
content:
# GraphWiki Index

Welcome to the GraphWiki knowledge base. This index lists all concepts, entities, and modules tracked by the graph.

## Communities

- Community 1: Alpha-Beta cluster
- Community 2: Gamma module

title: overview
content:
# Overview

GraphWiki tracks code relationships as a knowledge graph. Nodes represent functions, classes, and modules. Edges represent relationships like calls, imports, and uses.

title: AlphaFunction
content:
# AlphaFunction

AlphaFunction is a function located in the alpha module.

## Relationships

## Properties

- Type: function
